fields.label: Profile Name
fields.description: A unique name for this memory profile. Use descriptive names like 'Customer Support' or 'Code Review Assistant'.

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Describe what this profile is for and when it should be used. This helps users choose the right profile.

fields.label: Category
fields.options:
programming
science
language
reasoning
general
travel
crm
support
documentation
custom
fields.description: The domain category for this profile. Used for filtering and organization.

fields.label: Is System Profile
fields.description: System profiles are managed by the platform and may be updated automatically. User-created profiles should not be marked as system profiles.

fields.label: Icon
fields.description: Optional icon or image to visually identify this profile in the UI.

fields.label: Default Schema (JSON)
fields.description: JSON Schema defining the structure of memories captured with this profile. This ensures consistency and enables validation. See documentation for schema examples.

fields.label: Default Capture Prompt
fields.description: The prompt used to guide the LLM when extracting memories. Be specific about what information to capture and how to structure it.

fields.label: Default Capture Stage
fields.description: When memories should be captured: in_prompt (during generation), post_response (after response), conversation_end (when conversation closes), or scheduled (at specific times).

fields.label: Default Frequency
fields.options:
every_run
every_n_runs
every_n_turns
conversation_end
manual
scheduled
fields.description: How often to capture memories: every_run (each execution), every_n_runs (periodic), every_n_turns (after N messages), conversation_end, manual (explicit only), or scheduled.

fields.label: Default Scope Type
fields.description: The visibility scope of memories: conversation (isolated to this chat), user (shared across user's conversations), agent (global for this agent), namespace (shared group), or global (all agents).

fields.label: Default Indexing Mode
fields.description: How memories should be indexed: fts (full-text search only), vector (semantic search only), both (hybrid), or none (no indexing, retrieval by ID only).

fields.label: Default Retrieval Mode
fields.description: How memories are provided to the agent: inject (auto-include in prompt), tool_only (agent must request via tool), or hybrid (both methods).

fields.label: Default Memory Type Mapping
fields.description: JSON object mapping input patterns or keywords to memory types. Example: {'bug': 'observation', 'preference': 'preference'}. Used for automatic categorization.

fields.label: Recommended Model
fields.description: The AI model recommended for capture with this profile. Serves as guidance when configuring memory agents.

fields.label: Recommended Provider
fields.description: The AI provider recommended for capture with this profile. E.g., 'OpenAI', 'Anthropic', 'Google'.
